records.description: Copies a double-precision vector into another vector while negating each copied element.
records.clarification: The selected source has no separable full-description field; this wording preserves the verified catalogue purpose without inferring argument semantics.

records.description: Copies a single-precision vector into another vector while negating each copied element.
records.clarification: The selected source has no separable full-description field; this wording preserves the verified catalogue purpose without inferring argument semantics.
